Modelling the population of Nigeria using three mathematical
models (Exponential, Logistic and Gompertz) from 1960 to 2024

Modelling the population of Nigeria using three mathematical
models (Exponential, Logistic and Gompertz) from 1960 to 2024

subject.title: Mathematics Analysis and Approaches (AA)
subject.description:
**IB Mathematics Analysis and Approaches** is a **Group 5** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **number and algebra, functions, geometry and trigonometry, statistics and probability, and calculus**, with a strong focus on **theoretical understanding, formal mathematical reasoning, and analytical problem-solving**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2021**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| Assessment | Format | SL | HL | Weighting |
|------------|--------|----|----|-----------|
| **Paper 1** | Non-calculator written exam | 90 minutes | 120 minutes | 40% |
| **Paper 2** | Calculator allowed written exam | 90 minutes | 120 minutes | 40% |
| **Paper 3** | Calculator allowed problem-solving | N/A | 60 minutes | 20% (HL only) |
| **Mathematical Exploration** | Internal Assessment | 20 hours | 20 hours | 20% |

strengths: Well-defined introductionâbodyâconclusion structure with numbered tables/figures
Mostly relevant content with smooth transitions between sections
weaknesses: Formatting glitches (duplicated table rows, wide raw-data tables) interrupt the flow
Low-resolution images and broken cross-references reduce polish
Some repetition and unnecessary detail inflate length without adding insight
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Strand assessments indicate the exploration is coherent and logically developed (band 3) and well organized (band 3), but lapses in conciseness (band 2) prevent an exceptional score. A holistic assessment supports a score of 3.

strengths: Symbols and variables are clearly defined and used consistently
Effective use of algebraic derivations, tables and graphs linked in the discussion
Explanatory text accompanies each mathematical step, aiding reader comprehension
weaknesses: Minor notation inconsistencies (switching between ln and âlnâ)
Low-resolution figures limit precision of interpretations
Some steps (e.g. Gompertz vertical shift) lack worked examples or justification
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Each strand was awarded band 3: mostly consistent notation, effective representations and good logical clarity. Minor inconsistencies and missing detail preclude band 4, yielding a final score of 3.

strengths: Clear personal motivation linked to travel experiences and choice of context
Narrative demonstrates independent thinking through model selection and iterative refinement
Use of MAE/RMSE comparisons shows creativity and initiative beyond a basic fit
weaknesses: Parameter tuning relies on trial-and-error rather than systematic methods
Process follows standard textbook procedures with limited novel methodology
Adjustments are heuristic, limiting depth of personal innovation
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Strand assessments all fall in band 2: significant but not outstanding independent thought, a clear personal approach, and good creativity. This supports the mid-band score of 2.

strengths: Meaningful reflection on exponential vs logistic/Gompertz suitability
Thoughtful discussion of MAE vs RMSE and model performance
Clear evaluation of limitations and suggestions for future extensions
weaknesses: Reflection remains at a general descriptive level without deep critical probing
No sensitivity analysis or residual diagnostics to deepen critique
Evaluation of outcomes lacks quantitative testing of alternate scenarios
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Each reflection strand was placed in band 2: meaningful reflection, thoughtful analysis and clear evaluation but not the substantial critical depth needed for band 3. A holistic score of 2 is appropriate.

strengths: Derivations (exponential, logistic, Gompertz) are mostly correct and well explained
Mathematical methods (SE separation, statistical error metrics) are appropriately targeted
Use of HL-level calculus and error analysis demonstrates strong competence
weaknesses: Minor calculation errors (e.g. growthârate conversion) affect accuracy
Some parameter choices are heuristic rather than optimised
Key steps (partial fractions, transformation justifications) contain small flaws
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Use of mathematics is relevant, mostly accurate and fully commensurate with course level, meriting band 4. Occasional errors and lack of optimisation prevent the top band, so a final score of 4 is justified.

strandSelections.reasoning: Explanatory text accompanies each step of algebra, and arguments are generally easy to follow.  The justification for empirical adjustments to the logistic/Gompertz parameters is somewhat brief, preventing the very highest clarity level, but the logical structure remains good throughout the exploration.

Derivations are mostly correct and solutions are sensibly interpreted.  Minor inaccuracies (confusion between 0.0121 and 0.0257; empirically guessed stretch factors) do not undermine the essential correctness.  Explanations show good conceptual understanding, but the few errors prevent the âcompletely correctâ top-band score.

The student supplies equations, algebraic derivations, large tables of numerical values, and scatter/line graphs for each model, allowing the reader to view the mathematics from multiple perspectives.  These representations are clearly linked in the discussion, though resolution of some images limits precision; hence the work is âeffectiveâ rather than âhighly effective.â

The investigation is laid out in a clear sequence (rationale â aim â derivations â model fitting â error analysis â reflection).  Transitions between sections are generally smooth and the argument for why each new step is taken is usually explicit.  Minor lapsesâe.g., duplicated table rows, an unexplained jump when "mean growthârate" is first quoted, and an âError! Reference not foundâ tagâbreak the flow occasionally, so the work does not achieve the exceptional polish required for the top band.

Applying MAE/RMSE to compare models and experimenting with stretching/translation shows creativity and initiative beyond a single straightforward fit.  Nonetheless, adjustments are heuristic rather than systematically justified or optimised, so creativity is good but not exceptional.

The analysis of MAE vs RMSE and discussion of why each model succeeds or fails shows thoughtful consideration, yet it is largely descriptive.  A deeper, data-driven critique (parameter uncertainty, residual diagnostics) is missing, keeping the work in the âthoughtfulâ rather than âdeep and insightfulâ band.

The student identifies limitations (constant growth-rate assumption, fixed carrying capacity) and suggests future extensions (piecewise models, policy factors).  This constitutes a clear evaluation with implications, but there is no quantitative testing of alternate scenarios, so the evaluation is solid but not comprehensive.

The student reflects on why exponential outperforms logistic/Gompertz in this time-frame and recognises the influence of resource limits and future uncertainties.  Reflection is meaningful but remains general; it stops short of probing subtler implications (e.g., sensitivity to growth-rate estimation), so depth is adequate rather than critical.

Variables are defined up-front; differential and exponential notation are used correctly; units (millions) are stated in tables.  There are minor inconsistencies such as switching between $\ln$ and âlnâ, and the mis-typed growth rate explanation (0.0121 vs 0.0257), so accuracy is not perfect, but overall usage is mostly consistent and appropriate.

The studentâs narrative (trip to Nigeria, selection of models, iterative refinements) demonstrates a clear personal approach.  Still, the modelling process follows well-known textbook procedures without distinctive innovation, placing it in the mid-level band for personal approach.

Most content is pertinent, but several pages of full-year data, lengthy screen-shot explanations and repeated tables inflate the length without adding mathematical insight.  Occasional repetition of points already made (e.g., why the exponential model suits early growth) reduces overall conciseness, placing the work in the âmostly relevant with some unnecessary elementsâ band.

Differential-equation derivations, separation of variables, logarithmic manipulations, error metrics and transformations are all directly relevant to modelling population data, and each is used purposefully within the argument.  Although some parameter choices are approximate, the mathematics remains appropriate and correctly targeted at the research question.

Choosing a personally motivated context (observations while travelling) and deriving three competing models show notable independent thought.  However, parameter tuning is largely trial-and-error and relies on external projections rather than novel methodology, so the evidence is significant but not outstanding.

Headings, numbered tables/figures and an introductionâbodyâconclusion structure make navigation easy.  Derivations, graphs and error tables appear in logical places relative to the text.  Nevertheless, a few formatting glitches (very wide rawâdata table, low-resolution images) and the lack of a consistent appendix cross-referencing system indicate good rather than outstanding organisation.

The work employs HL-level calculus, exponential/logistic/Gompertz models and statistical error measures, all fully commensurate with the AA HL syllabus.  The mathematics goes beyond SL expectations but does not reach a level of sophisticated optimisation or stochastic modelling that would warrant the top band.

annotations.comment: The narrative effectively links personal experience with the investigationâs rationale, demonstrating clear independent thinking and a strong personal approach.
Definitions of symbols are clear and comprehensive, aiding the readerâs understanding of later derivations and ensuring consistent mathematical communication.
Table 1 is excessively wide and contains repeated rows, interrupting the flow. Consider summarizing data or relocating full-year figures to an appendix.
The scatter/line figure is low resolution, making precise comparisons difficult. Replace with higher-resolution or vector graphics for clearer visual analysis.
The separation of variables and integration steps in the exponential derivation are clearly presented, enhancing chemical clarity and logical flow of the solution.
The conversion from 2.57% to 0.0121 is incorrect. 2.57% should correspond to Gâ0.0257. Recalculate and update the model accordingly.
The discussion of the exponential fit includes thoughtful insight into early-growth suitability and later limitations, showing meaningful reflection on model performance.
The partial-fractions step sets A=0 for Pâ=0, but solving X = AÂ·X gives A=1. Correct this to ensure the logistic derivation is accurate.
The chosen carrying capacity of 450 million from UN projections should be accompanied by sensitivity analysis or discussion of alternative scenarios.
Parameters 1.64 and 1.97 are chosen heuristically for logistic transformations. Consider optimizing these via least-squares fitting to justify the exact values.
The final logistic model discussion is strong, but the justification for vertical translation merits deeper critical reflection on its impact beyond fitting.
When introducing substitution for the Gompertz derivation, provide more rationale for choosing u=ln(X/Pâ) to aid reader comprehension.
The horizontal dilation factor in the Gompertz transformation is not justified analytically. Explain its effect on the inflection point and model dynamics.
The final Gompertz model applies a vertical shift of 39 without showing calculation steps. Include a worked example to justify this translation.
Table 2 repeats its header partway through, which disrupts readability. Consolidate into a single continuous table or refactor into summary metrics.
The large comparison table could be split into summary charts or key years only, improving conciseness and ensuring relevance to the investigationâs aim.
Including a worked example for 1962 clarifies model applications and supports mathematical communication by showing each substituted step.
Text references the appendix for absolute and squared errors but includes no cross-references. Label appendices clearly in text to improve structure.
Table 9âs footnote mislabels RMSE as âRoot Mean Absolute Error.â Correct the term to âRoot Mean Square Errorâ for accuracy.
The discussion of MAE and RMSE results shows thoughtful analysis of model performance, reflecting on why exponential outperforms the alternatives.
The conclusion summarizes findings well but could deepen critical analysis by discussing parameter uncertainties or residual diagnostics.
The conclusion section effectively reflects on learning and personal growth, showing clear engagement and personal insights into modelling implications.
Limitations are well identified, but further research could specify models with variable rates or piecewise functions to capture changing growth phases.
The placeholder âError! Reference source not found.â disrupts the conclusion. Fix broken cross-reference to maintain coherence and polish.

The notation alternates between âlnâ and $
ln$ without clear distinction. Use consistent LaTeX notation $$
ln$$ throughout for precise mathematical communication.
